description:
In the image, a young man is seated at a desk in what appears to be a living room or studio apartment. He is dressed casually, wearing a blue shirt and shorts adorned with black and white patterns. His attention seems to be focused on a computer screen in front of him.

The desk itself is made of wood and holds two items: a glass of water filled halfway and a blue pen lying idle. Behind the man, a window reveals a glimpse of the world outside - a street lined with trees under a clear blue sky. The overall atmosphere suggests a quiet moment of work or study in a comfortable home setting.
